title: ISic001432. Base for Eukleidas
body:
Text encoding: Valentina Mignosa; edition source: https://www.zotero.org/groups/382445/items/F66S4X3M
1Εὐκλεί[δε̄ς]

Text encoding: Valentina Mignosa; edition source: https://www.zotero.org/groups/382445/items/F66S4X3M
1ΕΥΚΛΕΙ[....]

Facsimile Images

Apparatus criticus

Text of IGPalermo

translation

commentary

Whether the name was in the Doric form (Eukleidas) or not, cannot be determined. The name is that of one of the three founders (oikists) of Himera (Thucydides VI.5.1) and so would seem to attest to a cult of the founder(s) and a base/statue in his honour.

bibliography

  • 1971.0764 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10001282
  • Manni Piraino 1970 347-349 no.6 fig.17 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10001359
  • Manni Piraino 1973 17 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10000531
  • Dubois 1989 12 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10000187
  • Brugnone 2017 37 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10002329

Deep square letters, epsilon with three equal bars, perpendicular, lambda of standard form, upsilon without tail (V).

Line 1 15-18 Interlineation line 1 to 2
